title: worst-luck-possible
description: Makes the game as difficult as possible, without adding anything impossible to encounter in vanilla Minecraft.
body:
## List of features:
### Loot
- Mob loot is always the smallest possible
- Block drops are always the smallest possible 
- Flint never drops from gravel
- Piglin barters always give 2 magma cream
- Item drops always fly away from the player

### Mobs
- Zombies are always baby zombies (including all zombie variants)
- Monsters always spawn the highest amount of gear possible (on the right difficulty)
- Zombies always spawn reinforcements when hit (on hard)
- Endermen will only try to teleport to wherever you're looking
- The ender dragon will never perch and fly as high as it's allowed to
- Every spider is a spider jockey (with invisibility if on Hard)

### Spawns
- Passive mobs will not spawn naturally, but can still spawn when it's seed dependant
- Fish/Dolphins don't spawn at all
- Hostile mobs will spawn in the biggest packs possible
- Mobs will spawn as close to the player as possible
- Mobs will always try to pathfind around the player and be as annoying as possible
- Drowned are a lot more common

### Other
- Playing on a random seed always gives you the seed: -4231131849898478410
- Projectiles shoot in completely random directions
- Thunderstorms start every 10 minutes
- During a thunderstorm, a lightning strike will hit on every tick on every loaded chunk (laggy on high render distance)

I made this mod primarly for my youtube video:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LYmyuoRJecA

I tried to make it so everything that happens in this mod is technically possible to encounter in Vanilla minecraft. But it's not perfect. Please don't hate, it's my first time ever making a mod and some of the code was AI generated (shoutout ChatGPT). The mod is quite hard to beat and straight up impossible on a random seed.
